heading: Inspecting and rating air navigation facilities
label: 44708 Inspecting and rating air navigation facilities
text: The Administrator of the Federal Aviation Administration may inspect, classify, and rate an air navigation facility available for the use of civil aircraft on the suitability of the facility for that use.
